chunks.text: Visiting Research Scholars - EECS at Berkeley Visiting Researcher Scholars A number of visiting researchers are invited each year under the University’s Visiting Researcher Scholar and Postdoctoral Affairs (VSPA) program. Prospective Candidates You must be invited to participate by a member of the EECS faculty. Information and Applications Newly Arriving Scholars Steps for Newly Arriving EECS Department Visiting Researcher Scholars, Visiting Student Researchers, and Paid-Direct Postdocs New Visiting Scholars Guide View Open Faculty Positions
